Create and manage Kustomer customers, co: Create and manage Kustomer customers, conversations, and custom objects.
Authenticate using a Kustomer API token.

Paste a private Kustomer API token with access to customers, conversations, and KObjects.
Creates a new customer record in Kustome: Creates a new customer record in Kustomer.
Creates a new conversation in Kustomer.
Updates an existing conversation in Kust: Updates an existing conversation in Kustomer.
Gets a customer by ID from Kustomer.
Retrieves all custom objects (KObjects): Retrieves all custom objects (KObjects) for a given class in Kustomer.

Primary email address of the customer.
Primary phone number in E.164 format (e.g. "+14155551234").
Name of the company the customer belongs: Name of the company the customer belongs to.
Unique identifier from your own system (: Unique identifier from your own system (e.g. your CRM or database ID). Used to link this Kustomer record back to your data.
The customer's username in your system.
Customer's birth date in ISO 8601 format: Customer's birth date in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "1990-06-15T00:00:00.000Z").
When the customer registered, in ISO 860: When the customer registered, in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z").
URL of the customer's profile image.
The Kustomer ID of the customer this con: The Kustomer ID of the customer this conversation belongs to. You can get this from the "Get Customer" action or from the URL when viewing a customer in Kustomer.
A short subject or title for the convers: A short subject or title for the conversation (max 256 characters).
The initial status of the conversation.
\"Inbound\" means the customer initiated: "Inbound" means the customer initiated the conversation; "Outbound" means your team initiated it.
A unique identifier from your own system: A unique identifier from your own system to link this conversation (max 256 characters).
The channel used to reply in this conver: The channel used to reply in this conversation (e.g. "email", "chat"). Leave empty to use the workspace default.
The Kustomer ID of the conversation to u: The Kustomer ID of the conversation to update. You can get this from the "Create Conversation" action output or from the URL when viewing a conversation in Kustomer.
Change the status of the conversation.
Update the subject or title of the conve: Update the subject or title of the conversation.
The channel used to reply in this conver: The channel used to reply in this conversation (e.g. "email", "chat").
The API name of the custom object class: The API name of the custom object class to fetch (e.g. "order", "ticket"). You can find this in Kustomer under Settings > Custom Objects — it is the lowercase identifier, not the display label.
Only return objects created or updated o: Only return objects created or updated on or after this date. Use ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-15T00:00:00.000Z"). Leave empty to return all objects.
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
